purpose: Alternate Portal 2 credits page that uses the older Portal 1 terminal layout. It loads local style, cakedata, and cake scripts, provides lyric and credit border containers, and includes a fullscreen #splash overlay that gates the credits sequence behind user click/keypress to satisfy modern autoplay policy.
invariants: cakedata.js must load before cake.js because cake.js reads global credits and lyrics.
The lyrics and credits border ids are runtime API for portal2/portal1style/cake.js and style.css.
The #splash element with id 'splash' is the autoplay-policy gate; portal2/portal1style/cake.js queries it on DOMContentLoaded and dismisses it on click or Space.
gotchas: The file declares XHTML 1.0 Strict while serving a Portal 2 song/data set, which is intentional for the alternate old-style presentation.
Splash overlay styles are inline in <head>; removing the inline <style> block breaks the splash gate visually.
